/usr/bin/ar qc libec.a CMakeFiles/ec.dir/BUTTERFLY.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/Clay.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/Computation.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/ECBase.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/ECDAG.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/ECNode.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/HHXORPlus.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/NodeBatchTask.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/RDP.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/RSCONV.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/RSPIPE.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/Task.cc.o CMakeFiles/ec.dir/reed_sol.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libec.a
